outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated volatility expected. Negative GEX in Weekly (-0.14B) and Monthly (-0.82B) indicates dealers short gamma, amplifying price movements. 0DTE positive GEX provides short-term stability but longer-term structures favor acceleration.
outlook.summary: Market positioned bearishly with persistent negative gamma exposure in weekly and monthly expiries. Bearish skew across all timeframes (ratio 1.26-1.82) confirms fear premium on puts. Spot at 577.18 trades below max pain levels (587-593), creating magnetic pull toward dealer targets. Heavy PUT walls at 570 and 550 provide structural support, while 600 remains dominant CALL resistance. Unusual 0DTE structure shows massive ITM CALL concentration at 570, suggesting institutional positioning.

levels.motivazione: Monthly dominant resistance with 39,558 CALL OI. Major dealer hedging zone capping upside. Confluence with 4,729 Weekly CALL OI strengthens resistance.
Multi-expiry support confluence. Monthly 37,175 PUT + Weekly 2,675 PUT create structural floor. 0DTE shows unusual 64,977 ITM CALL concentration at same strike.
Weekly max pain level 1.7% above spot. Dealer target magnet active. Bearish skew suggests path of least resistance toward this level.
High PUT OI friction zone just above spot. Weekly 12,955 + Monthly 30,914 PUT OI. Dealers short puts create magnetic resistance from below.
Deep structural support. Monthly 32,296 PUT + Weekly 7,491 PUT. Last line of defense in bearish scenario. Extreme bearish skew validates importance.
Monthly PUT support with 15,147 OI. Secondary support between 570 and 550 walls. Negative GEX amplifies defense at this level.
Weekly CALL resistance with 6,308 OI. Pre-600 test zone. Break above targets max pain at 593.
0DTE immediate resistance with 24,048 CALL OI. Only significant CALL above spot in 0DTE. Intraday breakout trigger.

Monthly shows extreme bullish euphoria (PCR 0.03, reverse smirk) indicating potential overextension. No visible resistance levels in current data - uncharted territory. Watch for mean reversion if momentum stalls.

market_regime.interpretation: Levels are less reliable. Gamma flip zone is a transition area. Expect larger swings and whipsaws. Use caution.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low to moderate. Positive total GEX suppresses near-term volatility, but Monthly negative GEX adds tail risk for extended moves.
outlook.summary: Market trapped between 23300-23400 support and 24300-24400 resistance. Dealers net long gamma supports stability. Bearish skew across 0DTE and Monthly indicates put protection demand. Spot at 24000 pivot with heavy Monthly put OI creates friction. MM pin risk active near 23800 Max Pain.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE: Dominant Call OI across ALL expirations (235/471/412). Maximum dealer resistance zone. Monthly Max Pain magnet above spot.
CONFLUENCE: Highest Weekly Put OI (478) + Monthly (83). Weekly Max Pain alignment. Key structural support with bearish skew confirmation.
CONFLUENCE: At spot level. Highest Monthly Put OI (597). Active dealer hedging zone with gamma friction.
CONFLUENCE: Highest Weekly Call OI (531) + Monthly (97). Secondary resistance cluster above 24300.
CONFLUENCE: Highest 0DTE Put OI (84) + Weekly (474). Primary intraday support with bearish skew validation.
MAGNET: 0DTE Max Pain target. Near Gamma Flip zone. MM pin risk active for expiration.
FRICTION: Unusual volume activity (246 VOL vs 33 OI = 7.5x ratio). Deep support with high institutional activity.
PIVOT: 0DTE Gamma Flip. Sentiment equilibrium point. Positive gamma above, negative below.
WALL: Monthly Call OI (315). Extended resistance zone above 24300-24400 cluster.
WALL: Monthly Put OI (151). Just above spot. Minor support from put dealers in uptrend.
